summary: Tested NEW Workflow Timeline feature for Preventivo editor - 5 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. The timeline correctly shows 4 steps (Preventivo → Accettato → Fattura → Pagata) and the linked_invoice API enrichment works as expected.

backend_api.GET /api/preventivi/{id} after conversio: PASS - linked_invoice object with invoice_id, document_number, status
backend_api.linked_invoice.status: PASS - Shows current invoice status (bozza, emessa, pagata)
backend_api.Status propagation: PASS - Invoice status changes reflect in linked_invoice on GET

frontend.Workflow timeline visible: PASS - data-testid='workflow-timeline' present on saved preventivo
frontend.Step 1 Preventivo: PASS - Blue circle with document icon, shows PRV-YYYY-NNNN number
frontend.Step 2 Accettato: PASS - Gray when bozza, green when accettato
frontend.Step 3 Fattura: PASS - Gray when not converted, blue with FT number when converted
frontend.Step 4 Pagata: PASS - Gray initially, green when invoice status=pagata
frontend.Timeline connectors: PASS - Lines change color based on progress
frontend.Fattura click navigation: PASS - Clicking Fattura step navigates to invoice editor
frontend.Timeline hidden on new preventivo: PASS - Not shown until preventivo is saved

critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is clean and follows existing patterns
linked_invoice enrichment properly queries invoices collection with {_id: 0} projection
Frontend workflow state correctly populates from API response data
Timeline UI correctly uses Tailwind classes for color states
test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB (test-workflow-*, test-ui-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workflow Timeline feature fully tested. Key flows: 1) Save preventivo - timeline appears, 2) Convert to invoice - Accettato turns green, Fattura shows invoice number, 3) Click Fattura - navigates to invoice. The linked_invoice object in GET /api/preventivi/{id} contains {invoice_id, document_number, status} when converted_to exists. Invoice status changes via PATCH /api/invoices/{id}/status (not PUT).
